glosses.pt: alegrar-se; não ver a hora de
glosses.hi: खुश होना; बेसब्री से इंतजार करना
glosses.pl: cieszyć się; nie móc się doczekać
glosses.ro: a se bucura; a aștepta cu nerăbdare
glosses.ja: 喜ぶ; 楽しみにする

sentences.target: Ich kann mich auf morgen freuen.

translations.de: Ich kann mich auf morgen freuen.
translations.en: I can look forward to tomorrow.
translations.it: Non vedo l'ora che arrivi domani.
translations.vi: Tôi háo hức chờ ngày mai.
translations.uk: Я з нетерпінням чекаю на завтра.
translations.nb: Jeg gleder meg til i morgen.
translations.sv: Jag ser fram emot i morgon.
translations.da: Jeg glæder mig til i morgen.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular (1st person); subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense (1st person singular); selects the infinitive 'freuen' and forms a modal construction.
Reflexive pronoun, accusative singular (1st person); required by the reflexive verb 'sich freuen'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces the prepositional complement associated with 'freuen'.
Temporal noun used without article; object of the preposition 'auf' (accusative) specifying the anticipated time.
Main lexical verb in infinitive; part of the reflexive construction 'sich freuen (auf + Akk)' selected by the modal 'kann'.

sentences.target: Wir freuen uns sehr auf den Besuch.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈfʁɔɪ̯ən ʊns zeːɐ̯ aʊ̯f deːn bəˈzuːx/

translations.de: Wir freuen uns sehr auf den Besuch.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈfʁɔɪ̯ən ʊns zeːɐ̯ aʊ̯f deːn bəˈzuːx/
translations.en: We are really looking forward to the visit.
translations.es: Estamos muy emocionados por la visita.
translations.fr: Nous attendons la visite avec impatience.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们非常期待这次来访。
translations.pt: Estamos muito animados com a visita.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi rất mong chờ chuyến thăm.
translations.nl: We kijken erg uit naar het bezoek.
translations.uk: Ми з нетерпінням чекаємо на візит.
translations.hi: हम इस मुलाकात का बहुत इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi gleder oss veldig til besøket.
translations.sv: Vi ser verkligen fram emot besöket.
translations.da: Vi glæder os meget til besøget.
translations.ja: 私たちは訪問をとても楽しみにしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative plural (1st person); subject.
Finite main verb, present tense (1st person plural); used reflexively.
Reflexive pronoun, accusative plural (1st person); required by 'sich freuen' and coreferential with the subject.
Degree adverb; intensifies the predicate 'freuen'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces the prepositional object of 'freuen'.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Besuch'.
Noun; object of the preposition 'auf' (prepositional complement to 'freuen').

sentences.target: Er wird sich über das Geschenk freuen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ vɪʁt zɪç ˈyːbɐ das ɡəˈʃɛŋk ˈfʁɔɪ̯ən/

translations.de: Er wird sich über das Geschenk freuen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ vɪʁt zɪç ˈyːbɐ das ɡəˈʃɛŋk ˈfʁɔɪ̯ən/
translations.en: He will be happy about the gift.
translations.es: Le va a gustar el regalo.
translations.vi: Anh ấy sẽ thích món quà.
translations.nl: Hij zal blij sein met het cadeau.
translations.id: Dia akan senang dengan hadiah itu.
translations.ro: El se va bucura de cadou.
translations.ja: 彼はそのプレゼントを喜びます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular (3rd person masculine); subject.
Finite auxiliary forming Futur I (3rd person singular); selects the infinitive 'freuen'.
Reflexive pronoun, accusative (3rd person); required by the reflexive verb 'sich freuen'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces the PP complement of 'freuen' indicating the cause of joy.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Geschenk'.
Noun; object of the preposition 'über' (topic that one is pleased about).
Main lexical verb in infinitive; in the reflexive construction 'sich freuen (über + Akk)'.

sentences.target: Du kannst dich auf das Konzert freuen.
sentences.reading: /duː kanst dɪç aʊ̯f das kɔnˈt͡sɛʁt ˈfʁɔɪ̯ən/

translations.de: Du kannst dich auf das Konzert freuen.
translations.ipa: /duː kanst dɪç aʊ̯f das kɔnˈt͡sɛʁt ˈfʁɔɪ̯ən/
translations.en: You can look forward to the concert.
translations.es: Puedes estar emocionado por el concierto.
translations.fr: Tu peux attendre le concert avec impatience.
translations.it: Puoi aspettare con impazienza il concerto.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以期待这场音乐会。
translations.yue: 你可以期待呢場音樂會。
translations.ru: Ты можешь с нетерпением ждать концерта.
translations.pt: Você pode ficar animado com o concerto.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể mong đợi buổi hòa nhạc.
translations.nl: Je kunt uitkijken naar het concert.
translations.uk: Ти можеш з нетерпінням чекати на концерт.
translations.hi: तुम कॉन्सर्ट का इंतज़ार कर सकते हो।
translations.el: Μπορείς να περιμένεις με ανυπομονησία τη συναυλία.
translations.nb: Du kan glede deg til konserten.
translations.sv: Du kan se fram emot konserten.
translations.ro: Poți să aștepți cu nerăbdare concertul.
translations.da: Du kan glæde dig til koncerten.
translations.ja: コンサートを楽しみにしてもいいよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular (2nd person); subject.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense (2nd person singular); selects the infinitive 'freuen'.
Reflexive pronoun, accusative singular (2nd person); required by 'sich freuen'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces the PP complement of 'freuen'.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Konzert'.
Noun; object of the preposition 'auf' indicating the anticipated event.
Main lexical verb in infinitive; with the modal 'kannst' forms a modal infinitive construction; reflexive 'sich freuen (auf + Akk)'.
